/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libsentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libsentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/sentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/sentry_msgs/msg/detail/vw__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/sentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/sentry_msgs/msg/detail/scan_mode__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/sentry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/sentry_msgs/msg/detail/armor_presence__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/chen/sentry_try/sentry_ws/build/sentry_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libsentry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
